summary: Terms page successfully implements the legal document layout with proper diner aesthetic elements, correct typography hierarchy, and all required content sections. Minor palette deviation in link color but core functionality and branding are intact.

actions.description: Confirm the support email link uses the exact rose color #b83f5f specified in M.palette.10
